title: Senior Doctor - Sankara Nethralaya - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Sankara Nethralaya - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Sankara Nethralaya, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Amritsar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Sankara Nethralaya:
Sankara Nethralaya is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sankara Nethralaya!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
